text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Well, well... If it isn't the Emperor<n>herself. Have you come all this way<n>just to see how the common folk<n>amuse themselves?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Don't be so defensive. I'll leave as<n>soon as I've finished my business<n>here. As the student council president,<n>I have a favor to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: A favor?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'll get straight to the point. I want you<n>to convince the students in your orbit<n>to participate in the Ligne Droite.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Following a student suggestion,<n>we've officially decided to introduce<n>DJ time into the event. We've even<n>requested the music artist mentioned<n>by the student body to appear as a<n>guest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: This new school year will begin with<n>more pomp and splendor than any<n>before. None of this is mandatory, of<n>course, but I promise that you'll each<n>benefit from it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A world of possibility awaits... I want<n>this to show that all students have a<n>prosperous future ahead of them. My<n>wish is that the start of a new term<n>inspires everyone to climb to greater<n>heights.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I see now! You're lowering the bar<n>for the underachievers who can't<n>even take a single step on their own!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: All that's left is to make me, the top<n>dog, feel important by bowing your<n>head. Then I'll bring all my followers<n>in line, right?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm not amused. You'd do well<n>to keep your ego in check.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My ego? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Ha, don't play dumb. "Celebrating the<n>new school year" sounds nice and all,<n>but it's all for your own benefit. And<n>you say it'll make us happy? Please.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: A "prosperous future"? "Climb togreater heights"? You just want to bethe one who bestows those thingsupon us... If that's not ego, I don'tknow what is.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I know you think you're bringing the<n>gospel... But admit your arrogance,<n>Rudolf. You believe you're some kind<n>of chosen one!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Heh, if we're clear now, then be on<n>your way. I'm not getting on your<n>"ark." If you're going to keep<n>insisting, then you'd better grab a cue<n>already.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You there. May I borrow your cue?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, s-sure!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that jump shot was high! And<n>the angle... It was perfect...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Have you forgotten, Sirius? I learned<n>that technique because you begged<n>me to... I suppose I'll never surpass<n>the me in your memories.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: There's no point if you're unwilling,<n>so I take it back—your assistance<n>isn't required. I'll simply make more<n>announcements. Pardon the<n>interruption.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Geez... The president's just as scary<n>as you'd think. Hey, what was all<n>that about memories?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: This isn't like her...

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Nothing. It pains me to say she and I<n>are old friends. But anyway, are you<n>two going to the Droit? Tell me the<n>truth.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: N-nah... I figured I'd skip again. Too<n>much pressure. My racing<n>performance doesn't really deserve<n>some fancy dress... You know?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: Oh, y-yeah... Same here, I guess. It's<n>not like having DJ time changes<n>anything really...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: You're so beautiful, Fuji! Woooow,<n>stunning...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone. Now, where<n>might she be...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Come out, come out. Don't hide, my<n>date. Won't you honor us with your<n>presence?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Well! You look positively marvelous!<n>While still formal, your attire still does<n>justice to your playful spirit. Hehe,<n>you're sending my heart aflutter.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I figured. Pretty words sure<n>come easy to you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm only speaking from my heart.<n>Maybe you should do the same. So?<n>How's my dress look?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...You're nothing short of a goddess<n>or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, we've finished with our outfits,so let's just forget all that and enjoyourselves. We made a deal, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: A deal?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes, seeing that you'll most definitelyrefuse any invitation, even though Imust have you no matter what...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I have no other option but to force you<n>to accept, by sweetening the offer. If<n>you go with me, I'll give you<n>something you really want.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, and you know what that is?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm a dorm leader. If ever you need a<n>quiet place to nap, you can use my<n>room. Or I could hold a scrimmage for<n>you to race in.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I could even... get you a race with<n>famous G1 winners. Almost any wish<n>you have would be mine to grant.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm... But why are you so bent on<n>going with me? I'm no master dancer<n>or anything. And as you can see, I<n>have zero desire to do it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You did try flattering me with that"trickster" talk... Sure you don't havesome ulterior motive?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's just like I said. I simply want the<n>Droit to be great. And I knew you'd<n>be just the person to make that<n>happen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (Oh, come on. Who is she kidding? Iknow she's hiding something...maybe...)
